events.name: Milwaukee Bucks at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Former Thunder forward Ousmane Dieng had 19 points, 11 rebounds, six assists and four blocks, and the Milwaukee Bucks beat Oklahoma City 110-93 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Former Thunder forward Ousmane Dieng powers Bucks past Oklahoma City, 110-93
